README.md

MetaboCommand

Metabolic Commerce Multi-Agent Platform

AI agents for eCommerce finance and ops, built with Next.js 16 + Supabase Realtime + Presence

Demo

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/demo.mp4

Generated with demo-video-generator

Overview

MetaboCommand is a metabolic commerce multi-agent platform that applies biological metabolism principles to eCommerce operations. Just as a cell's metabolic pathways continuously convert inputs into energy and building blocks, MetaboCommand's AI agents continuously process business signals — cash flow anomalies, inventory velocity, customer churn precursors — into actionable recommendations that keep the business alive and growing.

The platform provides two specialized command centers: a Capital Reflex System for the finance workspace and an Operations Command Center for the ops workspace. Each workspace is powered by a team of autonomous AI agents that monitor KPIs, detect anomalies, propose actions, and learn from human approval/rejection feedback. All agent proposals pass through a human-in-the-loop approval queue — no autonomous execution, ever.

Built on Next.js 16 with Supabase Realtime + Presence, MetaboCommand delivers live-updating dashboards where multiple team members can collaborate on agent proposals simultaneously, with real-time presence indicators and instant state synchronization.

Architecture

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     MetaboCommand                            │
│                  (Next.js 16 + Supabase)                     │
├─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┤
│   FINANCE WORKSPACE     │      OPERATIONS WORKSPACE          │
│   Capital Reflex System │      Operations Command Center     │
├─────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────┤
│  Pulse Agent            │  Acquisition Agent                 │
│  Oracle Agent           │  Conversion Agent                  │
│  Sniper Agent           │  Retention Agent                   │
│  Conductor Agent        │  Demand Prophet Agent              │
│                         │  Logistics Conductor Agent          │
│                         │  Support Reflex Agent               │
│                         │  Advocacy Agent                    │
│                         │  Harmony Agent                     │
├─────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────┤
│              SHARED INFRASTRUCTURE                            │
│  Approval Queue  ·  Agent Log  ·  Activity History          │
│  Role-Based Access  ·  Slack Integration  ·  Presence       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

The Finance Agents

Agent Function What It Monitors
Pulse Agent Vital signs monitor Revenue trends, burn rate, cash runway, MRR/ARR momentum
Oracle Agent Predictive forecaster Revenue forecasts, expense projections, cash flow predictions
Sniper Agent Anomaly detector Unusual transactions, margin drift, late payments, outlier expenses
Conductor Agent Capital allocator Optimization recommendations for capital deployment across channels

Finance Dashboard KPIs

  • Total Capital Deployed — Active capital across all channels
  • Net Capital Velocity Score — Speed of capital recycling (higher = healthier)
  • Active Anomalies — Flagged items requiring human review
  • Pending Approvals — Agent proposals awaiting finance decision

The Operations Agents

Agent Function What It Monitors
Acquisition Agent Customer acquisition CAC trends, channel efficiency, funnel conversion rates
Conversion Agent Funnel optimization Cart abandonment, checkout friction, conversion rate by segment
Retention Agent Churn prevention Cohort retention, repeat purchase rate, NPS signals
Demand Prophet Agent Demand forecasting Inventory needs, seasonal patterns, trend detection
Logistics Conductor Agent Supply chain orchestration Fulfillment times, carrier performance, cost optimization
Support Reflex Agent Customer support triage Ticket volume, response time, escalation patterns
Advocacy Agent Brand ambassador program Referral rates, social sentiment, UGC trends
Harmony Agent Cross-functional alignment Finance-ops reconciliation, goal alignment, conflict detection

Operating Modes

  • Efficiency Mode — Minimize waste, optimize margins, reduce churn
  • Growth Mode — Maximize acquisition, expand channels, increase velocity

Features

  • Multi-Agent Architecture — 12 specialized AI agents across finance and operations, each with distinct personas and expertise
  • Human-in-the-Loop Approval — Every agent proposal goes through an approval queue before execution; no autonomous actions
  • Real-Time Dashboards — Supabase Realtime powers live-updating KPIs, charts, and agent status
  • Presence-Aware Collaboration — Supabase Presence shows which team members are viewing which dashboards
  • Role-Based Access Control — Finance and Operations workspaces with per-role agent assignments and approval queues
  • Agent Threshold Configuration — Tune sensitivity and aggressiveness of each agent independently
  • Activity History & Audit Trail — Full log of all user actions and agent proposals with timestamps
  • Slack Integration — Receive approval notifications and agent alerts directly in Slack
  • Operating Mode Toggle — Switch between efficiency and growth modes to shift agent behavior
  • Responsive UI — Built with Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui, works on desktop and mobile

Tech Stack

Layer Technology
Framework Next.js 16 (App Router, Server Components)
Language TypeScript
Database & Auth Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row Level Security)
Realtime Supabase Realtime + Presence
Styling Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui
Icons Lucide React
Date Handling date-fns

Getting Started

Prerequisites

  • Node.js >= 18
  • A Supabase project

Setup

# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/zan-maker/metabocommand.git
cd metabocommand

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Configure environment
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your Supabase URL and anon key

# Set up the database
# Apply the Supabase migrations in supabase/migrations/

# Run the development server
npm run dev

Open http://localhost:3000 to view the app.

Project Structure

metabocommand/
├── src/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── login/                 # Authentication page
│   │   ├── (dashboard)/
│   │   │   ├── finance/           # Capital Reflex System (Pulse, Oracle, Sniper, Conductor)
│   │   │   ├── operations/        # Operations Command Center (8 agents)
│   │   │   ├── approvals/         # Human-in-the-loop approval queue
│   │   │   ├── agent-log/         # Chronological agent action log
│   │   │   ├── activity/          # User activity history
│   │   │   ├── settings/          # Agent thresholds, operating mode, Slack
│   │   │   └── profile/           # User profile management
│   │   └── api/                   # API routes (approvals, agents, settings, Slack)
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── sidebar.tsx            # Role-aware navigation sidebar
│   │   ├── kpi-card.tsx           # Reusable KPI card component
│   │   └── ui/                    # shadcn/ui primitives
│   └── lib/
│       ├── supabase/              # Supabase client, server, middleware, types
│       ├── dummy-data.ts          # Demo KPI data
│       ├── slack.ts               # Slack webhook integration
│       └── utils.ts               # Formatting and utility functions
├── supabase/
│   └── migrations/                # Database schema migrations
├── assets/
│   └── demo.mp4                   # Demo video
└── docs/                          # Additional documentation

How It Works

  1. Agents Monitor — Each agent continuously analyzes its domain-specific KPIs and data streams
  2. Anomalies Detected — When an agent identifies an anomaly, trend shift, or optimization opportunity, it drafts a proposal
  3. Proposal Queued — The proposal enters the Approval Queue for the relevant workspace (finance or operations)
  4. Human Reviews — A team member reviews the proposal, views the supporting data, and decides to approve, reject, or modify
  5. Action Executed — Approved actions are executed; the outcome is logged and fed back into agent learning
  6. Presence Sync — All changes propagate in real-time to all connected team members via Supabase Realtime

MIT — see LICENSE for details.
